cutscene1_dialogo_cutscene_0: They aren't only stamps! Where i come from, they have a very important simbolism.
cutscene1_dialogo_cutscene_1: Represent our entire life. The Beggining, important changes, fresh starts. Even the end.
cutscene1_dialogo_cutscene_2: It's something important for our culture. Simbolize our individuality in the colective.
cutscene1_dialogo_cutscene_3: Funny to imagine that it isn't like this in this muddy plane-
cutscene1_dialogo_cutscene_5: The stamp reminds me of my identity. I know who i am because of it.
cutscene1_dialogo_cutscene_6: How do you know who you are if you don't have that? What's your stamp?
